title: Team thinking, visualized by Claude
summary: Anthropic's Claude was used to visualize the thinking patterns of Williams F1 Team drivers and garage staff during racing. The visualizations, called Pattern of Thought, were displayed on helmets, race suits, and garage environments starting at Monaco.
